zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Brocas於大約1290年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏時，他的父親Sir Arnald de Brocas25歲，母親Margaret Campaine19歲。他於大約1309年與Margaret Fettiplace在英國波克夏結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年1月15日在英國英格蘭波克夏可列維爾享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brocas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  French: locative name from Brocas in Les Landes, SW France.

variants.name: Brookhouse
meanings: English: topographic name for a house by a stream, from Middle English brok(e) ‘brook’ + hous ‘house’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Brookhouse in Laughton (Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Brocas was born about 1290, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Arnald de Brocas, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Campaine, was 19. He married Margaret Fettiplace about 1309, in Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 January 1365, in Clewer, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Brocas est né environ 1290, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Arnald de Brocas, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Campaine, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fettiplace environ 1309, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 janvier 1365, à Clewer, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ko.Sherborne St John, Hampshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 셔본 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Brocas(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Arnald de Brocas(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Campaine(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1309년 영국 버크실르에서 Margaret Fettiplace(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 1월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 클루어에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Fettiplace aproximadamente 1309, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Sherborne St John, Hampshire, England: ширборн ст джон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Brocas родился около 1290 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Arnald de Brocas было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Campaine, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fettiplace около 1309 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 января 1365 г. в местности кльвир, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

Se casó con Margaret Fettiplace aproximadamente 1309, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
